title: Placus flexuosus
taxonomy: Placus flexuosus is classified within the family Placaceae, which is a small group of plants commonly known as placas. This family is part of the order Placales, a larger group of plants that also includes the family Podocarpaceae. Placus flexuosus can be further classified as a genus within the family Placaceae. The classification of Placus flexuosus is based on its morphological and anatomical characteristics. This classification helps scientists understand the evolutionary relationships and diversity within the plant kingdom.
